flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Emory & Henry University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.2k → $39.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Emory & Henry University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.2k → $39.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Emory & Henry University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Emory & Henry University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (50.7% → 56.3%).
